fixes_applied: Verified prior batch agent's fix: tests/test.sh V043_PY tail correctly separates P2P_GATING from P2P_REGRESSION. Only P2P_GATING (p2p_no_decision_engine_breakage) can hard_zero the reward; P2P_REGRESSION ids (p2p_upstream_7a8254b6 cargo_metadata_workspace, p2p_upstream_8bccf1bd rust_files_nonempty) are informational only, matching CLAUDE.md v0.4.3.1 policy and the manifest's kind: P2P_REGRESSION declaration.
notes: Canonical patch is exact (juspay/hyperswitch#8296 closing #8295, +254/-4 across 17 files, base 713c85d2). Manifest declares 12 F2P gates summing to 1.00 plus 1 P2P_GATING + 2 P2P_REGRESSION; all gate IDs match what test.sh emits. F2P gates are diversified (enum variants, DecisionEngine rename across 3 files, typed admin fields >=4/6 structs, diesel models, schema v1+v2 columns, domain model, migration, core/admin bridge wiring, to_merchant_category_name helper, apply_changeset propagation, callsite cleanup, WASM helper); thresholds permit minor variation (>=6/7 MCCs, >=5/7 rename attrs, >=4/6 admin structs). Max single F2P weight 0.14 (admin_typed_field_strict) — well under R006 0.50 threshold. Bash early-exit at line 60 only fires when P2P_GATING fails (correct). V043_PY tail score formula bounded [0,1] via if reward>1.0 cap (sum of weights == 1.0 so inner_weight pattern unnecessary). No instruction/manifest/test.sh divergence. Stale curator_results entry (skip due to missing e2b template) overwritten with this curation verdict.
